name: docomator
description: Автономная платформа формирования и автоматизации документов DOCX и XLSX с локальной поддержкой ИИ.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @docomator/contracts && npm run build -w @docomator/config && npm run build -w @docomator/storage && npm run build -w @docomator/document-intake && npm run build -w @docomator/template-compiler && npm run build -w @docomator/api && npm run build -w @docomator/worker
scripts.test: npm run test -w @docomator/contracts && npm run test -w @docomator/config && npm run test -w @docomator/storage && npm run test -w @docomator/document-intake && npm run test -w @docomator/template-compiler && npm run test -w @docomator/api && npm run test -w @docomator/worker && node --test scripts/runtime/*.test.mjs
scripts.check:runtime: node --check scripts/runtime/automatic-backup.mjs && node --check scripts/runtime/pilot-readiness.mjs && node --check scripts/runtime/ux-acceptance.mjs && node --check scripts/runtime/ux-acceptance-lib.mjs && node --check scripts/runtime/ux-acceptance-report-contracts.mjs && node --check scripts/runtime/ux-acceptance-automation.mjs && node --check scripts/ci/release-gate.mjs && node --check scripts/ci/release-gate-crash-worker.mjs && node --check scripts/ci/libreoffice-release-gate.mjs
scripts.check:ui: node --check apps/api/ui/app.js && node --check apps/api/ui/document-intake.js && node --check apps/api/ui/document-structure.js && node --check apps/api/ui/template-trial.js && node --check apps/api/ui/template-multi-trial.js && node --check apps/api/ui/template-activation.js && node --check apps/api/ui/document-generation.js && node --check apps/api/ui/document-generation-preflight.js && node --check apps/api/ui/document-data-correction.js && node --check apps/api/ui/document-generation-retry.js && node --check apps/api/ui/document-delivery.js && node --check apps/api/ui/document-email-delivery.js && node --check apps/api/ui/email-recipients.js && node --check apps/api/ui/document-schedules.js && node --check apps/api/ui/document-schedule-network.js && node --check apps/api/ui/shared-document-results.js && node --check apps/api/ui/shared-document-view-labels.js && node --check apps/api/ui/shared-corporate-mode.js && node --check apps/api/ui/storage-maintenance.js && node --check apps/api/ui/bulk-data-import.js && node --check apps/api/ui/operation-center.js && node --check apps/api/ui/operations-readiness.js && node scripts/ci/check-ui-bundles.mjs
scripts.check: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run test && npm run test:release-gate && npm run test:release-gate:libreoffice && npm run check:docs && npm run check:no-iam && npm run check:shell && npm run check:runtime && npm run check:ui && npm run check:language
